mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM posts WHERE slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seed_content_identity ( namespace, entity_type, seed_key, entity_id, pack_version, content_hash, metadata, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{namespace}, #{entityType}, #{seedKey}, #{entityId}, #{packVersion}, #{contentHash}, #{metadataJson}, NOW(3), NOW(3) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE entity_id = IF( namespace = VALUES(namespace) AND entity_type = VALUES(entity_type) AND seed_key = VALUES(seed_key) AND entity_id = VALUES(entity_id), entity_id, NULL ), updated_at = NOW(3)
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, bio = #{bio}, handle = #{handle}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, school = #{school}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE id = #{id})
SELECT id, creator_id, CAST(tags AS CHAR) AS tags_json, content_object_key FROM posts WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET creator_id = #{creatorId}, title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, description = #{description}, content_url = #{contentUrl}, content_object_key = #{contentObjectKey}, content_etag = #{contentSha256}, content_size = #{contentSize}, content_sha256 = #{contentSha256}, tags = #{tagsJson}, img_urls = #{imgUrlsJson}, status = 'published', type = 'image_text', visible = 'public', is_top = 0, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, publish_time = #{publishTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments ( id, post_id, parent_id, user_id, content, is_chtholly, created_at, deleted_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{postId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{content}, 0, #{createdAt}, NULL, #{createdAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE post_id = VALUES(post_id), parent_id = VALUES(parent_id), user_id = VALUES(user_id), content = VALUES(content), is_chtholly = 0, created_at = VALUES(created_at), deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT id, from_user_id, to_user_id FROM following WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, from_user_id, to_user_id FROM follower WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO following (id, from_user_id, to_user_id, rel_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, 1, #{createdAt}, #{createdAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rel_status = 1, created_at = VALUES(created_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO follower (id, to_user_id, from_user_id, rel_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{toUserId}, #{fromUserId}, 1, #{createdAt}, #{createdAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rel_status = 1, created_at = VALUES(created_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT i.seed_key AS seedKey, u.id, u.handle, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.bio, u.gender, u.birthday, u.school, CAST(u.tags_json AS CHAR) AS tagsJson FROM seed_content_identity i JOIN users u ON u.id = i.entity_id WHERE i.namespace = #{namespace} AND i.entity_type = 'ACCOUNT' ORDER BY i.seed_key

SELECT i.seed_key AS seedKey, p.id, p.creator_id AS creatorId, p.slug, p.title, p.description, p.content_url AS contentUrl, p.content_object_key AS contentObjectKey, CAST(p.tags AS CHAR) AS tagsJson, CAST(p.img_urls AS CHAR) AS imgUrlsJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime FROM seed_content_identity i JOIN posts p ON p.id = i.entity_id WHERE i.namespace = #{namespace} AND i.entity_type = 'POST' ORDER BY i.seed_key

SELECT i.entity_type AS entityType, i.seed_key AS seedKey, c.id AS entityId, c.post_id AS postId, c.user_id AS userId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.deleted_at AS deletedAt FROM seed_content_identity i JOIN comments c ON c.id = i.entity_id WHERE i.namespace = #{namespace} AND i.entity_type = 'COMMENT' UNION ALL SELECT i.entity_type AS entityType, i.seed_key AS seedKey, f.id AS entityId, NULL AS postId, f.from_user_id AS userId, f.to_user_id AS parentId, NULL AS content, f.created_at AS createdAt, IF(f.rel_status = 1, NULL, f.updated_at) AS deletedAt FROM seed_content_identity i JOIN following f ON f.id = i.entity_id WHERE i.namespace = #{namespace} AND i.entity_type = 'FOLLOW' ORDER BY seedKey
